text.content: MAXAM TIRE ADDS TWO E4/L4 TO THE MS405 SERIES

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM TIRE ADDS TWO E4/L4 TO THE MS405 SERIES

text.content: Raising the bar in the OTR industry with two aggressive sizes

rich_text.plain_text: Raising the bar in the OTR industry with two aggressive sizes

text.content: MAXAM Tire, a global leader in specialty tire manufacturing, adds two aggressive sizes, 775/65R29 and 800/80R29 to its MS405 lineup, designed to tackle the extreme for loaders and articulated dump trucks

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM Tire, a global leader in specialty tire manufacturing, adds two aggressive sizes, 775/65R29 and 800/80R29 to its MS405 lineup, designed to tackle the extreme for loaders and articulated dump trucks

text.content: . Manufactured in MAXAM’s state-of-the-art radial tire facility using cutting-edge engineering and compounding technology, the new E4/L4 sizes in the MS405 series provides the OTR industry with yet another rugged and long-lasting solution.

rich_text.plain_text: . Manufactured in MAXAM’s state-of-the-art radial tire facility using cutting-edge engineering and compounding technology, the new E4/L4 sizes in the MS405 series provides the OTR industry with yet another rugged and long-lasting solution.

text.content: As one of the leading manufacturers offering the E4/L4 version of the 775/65R29 for loaders with a high traction pattern and extra-deep tread depth, the MS405 signifies MAXAM’s commitment to creating breakthrough products for the OTR industry. By encompassing a heavy-duty casing and bead construction with advanced compounding technology, the 775/65R29 boasts the ability to uphold aggressive jobs. Similar to the E4/L4 sizes within the series, the 775/65R29 MS405 has undergone advanced engineering and extensive research to perform beyond expectation.

rich_text.plain_text: As one of the leading manufacturers offering the E4/L4 version of the 775/65R29 for loaders with a high traction pattern and extra-deep tread depth, the MS405 signifies MAXAM’s commitment to creating breakthrough products for the OTR industry. By encompassing a heavy-duty casing and bead construction with advanced compounding technology, the 775/65R29 boasts the ability to uphold aggressive jobs. Similar to the E4/L4 sizes within the series, the 775/65R29 MS405 has undergone advanced engineering and extensive research to perform beyond expectation.

text.content: In addition to the 775/65R29, MAXAM Tire is bringing an aggressive E4/L4 800/80R29 size to the MS405 series, outworking the toughest demands that articulated dump trucks face. Featuring a high traction pattern with 50% more wearable tread compared to the alternative 33.25R29 E3 tire size, the 800/80R29 E4/L4 yields maximum tire life and productivity. Designed with the end user in mind, the MS405 800/80R29 also fits on the same wheel as most 33.25R29 tires.

rich_text.plain_text: In addition to the 775/65R29, MAXAM Tire is bringing an aggressive E4/L4 800/80R29 size to the MS405 series, outworking the toughest demands that articulated dump trucks face. Featuring a high traction pattern with 50% more wearable tread compared to the alternative 33.25R29 E3 tire size, the 800/80R29 E4/L4 yields maximum tire life and productivity. Designed with the end user in mind, the MS405 800/80R29 also fits on the same wheel as most 33.25R29 tires.

text.content: “In the demanding OTR global market, the addition of the 775/65R29 and 800/80R29 to the MS405 lineup further enhances MAXAM’s flagship OTR offering, delivering a comprehensive line of viable solutions to loaders and articulated dump trucks in every size. With only a few manufacturers providing the E4/L4 size in this pattern, this addition highlights MAXAM’s commitment to play a vital part in the OTR industry and its future. Focusing on maximizing E4/L4 applications’ resilience in the toughest environment, we aim to amplify operational productivity when creating the new sizes,” says Jimmy McDonnell, Vice President of Sales MAXAM Tire North America.

rich_text.plain_text: “In the demanding OTR global market, the addition of the 775/65R29 and 800/80R29 to the MS405 lineup further enhances MAXAM’s flagship OTR offering, delivering a comprehensive line of viable solutions to loaders and articulated dump trucks in every size. With only a few manufacturers providing the E4/L4 size in this pattern, this addition highlights MAXAM’s commitment to play a vital part in the OTR industry and its future. Focusing on maximizing E4/L4 applications’ resilience in the toughest environment, we aim to amplify operational productivity when creating the new sizes,” says Jimmy McDonnell, Vice President of Sales MAXAM Tire North America.

text.content: For more information on the MS405 775/65R29 and 800/80R29 sizes, please contact your local repressive or visit us at maxamtire.com
